title: rosa cuspidata var. anthracitica
intro: Rosa cuspidata var. anthracitica, also known as Purpleleaf Rose, is a variety of rose that is native to China and is characterized by its dark purple leaves and fragrant white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are derived from its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa cuspidata var. anthracitica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used to make skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
